title: Agentic Workspace Conformance Contracts Registry
description: Registry of conformance fixtures and the schemas they exercise.

summary.description: Short human-readable summary for this entry.

schema.description: Schema reference or schema metadata for this payload.

id.description: Stable identifier used to reference this record.

operation_id.description: Operation contract this record exercises or describes.

path.description: Path segments or repository path used by this contract.

adapter_kind.description: Allowed adapter kind value for routing or validation.

items.description: One entry in the contracts list.

contracts.description: Ordered contracts entries used by this contract.
